eval: 32 held-out 21x21 mazes, A*-FREE (no A* at eval)
best: frozen WM + learned subgoal + K=4 lookahead planner = 56.25%
lesson: Co-training lowered subgoal MSE (0.047<0.059) but reduced success (56->40%): moving the encoder erodes the fragile wall-aware fine WM the low level depends on. Freeze WM + better planner wins.
